rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §38.213, which governs acceptance of gifts, grants, and donations by schools. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A school district, open-enrollment charter school, or private school may accept gifts, grants, donations, and federal and local funds to implement this subchapter.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses an unrelated subject (school funding donations) with no connection to homestead exemption amounts.
